title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER A — Sara+Eva duo Tesla-cruise dance
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the music block duration.
prompt: Wide front-facing music-video shot — soft pastel gradient backdrop (sky-blue fading to soft mint) with a HUGE stylized RAINBOW arching across the upper half of the frame and CONFETTI flowing continuously down. NO scene, NO room, NO furniture, NO logos, NO text. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT stand side-by-side, grinning huge, bopping in rhythm. Sara claps on the beat. Eva spins on the spot then claps too. Sara leans left, Eva leans right. Sara pumps her fist up, Eva pumps her fist up. Sara spins once, Eva spins once. Both return to start position. Movements are RHYTHMIC and LOOPABLE — clean cycle: bop → clap → lean → fist-pump → spin → return. Camera locked, head-on, kid-eye-level. Bright cheerful party lighting. Sara and Eva hum and sing along generically — no specific dialogue, no lip-sync to any words. The shot is designed to LOOP cleanly: Sara and Eva return to the same side-by-side starting pose at second 0 and second 10. Rainbow arches and confetti continuously rain down. No audible speech, no music — silent render.
